title: chenopodium album var. ficifolium
intro: Chenopodium album var. ficifolium, also known as sea goosefoot, is a variety of the common lambsquarters plant, belonging to the Chenopodiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Chenopodium album var. ficifolium include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to soothe the stomach and relieve coughs.
